---
name: Documentation Task
about: Track documentation work, including decision-log follow-ups
title: "[Docs] <short title>"
labels: ["type:documentation"]
assignees: []
---

## Documentation Task
- Objective:
- Why this matters:
- Documentation area:
  - [ ] Decision log follow-up
  - [ ] New/updated implementation docs
  - [ ] API/reference docs
  - [ ] Runbook/operational docs
  - [ ] Contributor/onboarding docs
  - [ ] Other

## Decision Linkage (if applicable)
- Related decision ID(s): (e.g., DEC-0008, DEC-0009)
- Decision status:
  - [ ] Proposed
  - [ ] Accepted
  - [ ] Superseded
- What needs to be revisited from the decision:
- What output is expected:
  - [ ] Clarification note
  - [ ] Constraints documented
  - [ ] Migration plan
  - [ ] Follow-up tasks created
  - [ ] Decision updated

## Scope
- In scope:
- Out of scope:

## Deliverables
- [ ] Document(s) created/updated
- [ ] Cross-links added from index/relevant docs
- [ ] Examples/snippets added where helpful
- [ ] Terminology aligned with glossary/specs
- [ ] Related issue/PR links added

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Given the updated docs, when a team member follows them, then they can complete the intended task without tribal knowledge.
- [ ] Given a linked decision, when reviewed, then decision intent and current implementation/docs are consistent.
- [ ] Given this issue is complete, when docs are reviewed, then no obvious contradictions remain across related docs.

## Verification Checklist
- [ ] Accuracy checked against current code/config
- [ ] Internal links validated
- [ ] Commands/examples tested (where applicable)
- [ ] Security/privacy review considered (if relevant)
- [ ] Spelling/clarity pass completed

- Potential confusion areas:
- Dependencies:
